programme.title: 2015: Swindon Town v Sheffield United
programme.desc: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, Swindon Town host Sheffield United at the County Ground in a 10-goal thriller in the play-offs back in May 2015.

programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, East Anglian rivals Norwich City and Ipswich Town meet at Carrow Road in the Sky Bet play-offs in May 2015.

programme.title: MLB Epic Moments: An Ace Arrives
programme.desc: After an in-season trade in 2008, CC Sabathia's strong arm helps lead the Milwaukee Brewers to the postseason.

programme.desc: Pedro Martinez defies injury to pitch in Game 5 of the 1999 ALDS and lead the Boston Red Sox to an inspired victory over the Cleveland Indians.

programme.desc: MLB Epic Moments goes back to Game 1 of the 2012 World Series between the San Francisco Giants and Detroit Tigers.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: The Ultimate Pool 36Vegas Pairs Cup continues with a fresh format and even fiercer competition. This week's group is headlined by 2025 finalists Kristi Caulfield and Phil Parkin.

programme.title: FA Cup: The People's Story
programme.desc: We uncover the untold stories of the FA Cup, revealing how it became a stage where sport and society collide, capturing the spirit of a nation through the beautiful game.

programme.desc: Action from the mixed relay at the Ski Mountaineering World Cup in Villars-sur-Ollon, Switzerland.

programme.title: Ella Toone's Away Days
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the life and travels of England and Manchester United star Ella Toone.

programme.title: Live Women's FA Cup: Arsenal v Brighton
programme.desc: Action from the quarter-finals of the Adobe Women's FA Cup as 14-time winners Arsenal take on Brighton and Hove Albion at the Mangata Developments Stadium.

programme.title: Live FA Cup: West Ham v Leeds
programme.desc: West Ham United seek their first FA Cup semi-final since 2006 as they welcome 1972 winners Leeds United to the London Stadium. Followed by coverage of the semi-final draw.

programme.title: Valero Texas Open, PGA Tour Golf LIVE
programme.desc: Day three of the 2026 Valero Texas Open from TPC San Antonio, where last year, 2023 Champion Golfer of the Year Brian Harman claimed victory.

programme.title: Aramco Championship USA, Ladies European Golf Tour LIVE
programme.desc: The opening round of the Aramco Championship, a Ladies European Tour event staged at Shadow Creek Golf Course in Nevada. Spain's Nuria Iturrioz scooped last year's prize.

programme.desc: Live racing from Australia.

programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Racing Specials
programme.desc: Despite Cheltenham Festival and National winners, a recent lack of investment brought some testing times for trainer Rebecca Curtis. But one superstar horse has helped change that.

programme.title: Racing to Win
programme.desc: The latest in the series a comprehensive preview show for Hong Kong racing. With form analysis trackwork highlights and interviews an expert team of presenters will also provide their selections.

programme.title: International Raceday LIVE
programme.desc: Live international racing & UK greyhound racing as well as previewing the day's domestic horse racing.

programme.title: Raceday LIVE
programme.desc: Live racing from around the UK.

programme.title: Raceday LIVE
programme.desc: Live racing from around the UK.

programme.title: ATP Final: Miami
programme.desc: Jannik Sinner's chance to join an exclusive list of Sunshine Double winners arrives as the Italian world number two faces the explosive Czech Jiri Lehecka in the Miami Open final. (29.03).

programme.title: WTA Final: Miami
programme.desc: Aryna Sabalenka and Coco Gauff share the stage in a final for the fourth time, with hometown favourite Gauff bidding to deny defending Miami champion Sabalenka the Sunshine Double. (28.03).

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: The final day of the 2026 Texas Children's Houston Open, taking place at Memorial Park Golf Course. Min Woo Lee claimed last year's title in record-setting fashion. (29.03).

programme.title: Live Ladies European Tour Golf
programme.desc: The third round of the Aramco Championship, a Ladies European Tour event staged at Shadow Creek Golf Course in Nevada. Spain's Nuria Iturrioz scooped last year's prize.

programme.title: IPL Mumbai.I v Kolkata.KR Hlts
programme.desc: At the Wankhede, the Mumbai Indians take on the Kolkata Knight Riders. The Mumbai Indians enter the 2026 edition of the IPL on the back of a fourth-placed finish last year. (29.03).

programme.title: Darts Gold: Harrington v Baxter
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic darts matches. Here is Ronnie Baxter against Rod Harrington in the final of the 1998 World Matchplay.

programme.title: Darts Gold: Matchplay Final 2005
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic darts matches. Here is Colin Lloyd against John Part in the final of the 2005 World Matchplay.

programme.title: Darts Gold: Taylor v Jenkins 2013
programme.desc: Phil Taylor plays Terry Jenkins in the second round of the 2013 World Matchplay Darts. Jenkins was the last person to beat Taylor in this event in 2007, coming close to repeating the trick.

programme.title: Darts Gold: Lewis v MVG 2013
programme.desc: Adrian Lewis meets Michael Van Gerwen in the semi-finals of the 2013 World Matchplay. Lewis beat Andy Hamilton in the previous round, while Van Gerwen defeated Dave Chisnall.

programme.title: PDC Classics 2023
programme.desc: Revisit Phil Taylor's fourth World Championship victory, achieved at the 1996 PDC World Championship in victory over rival Dennis Priestley. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Bristow v Taylor: WDC SF 1997
programme.desc: Revisit a semi-final from the 1997 World Darts Championship that pitted Eric Bristow, who was enjoying one of his greatest runs in the PDC, up against Phil Taylor. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Taylor v Mason 2002
programme.desc: In a match that saw the first-ever televised nine-darter, revisit this classic contest between Phil Taylor and Chris Mason at the 2002 World Matchplay. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Taylor v Painter 2004
programme.desc: Trailing Kevin Painter 4-1, a ninth World Championship title looked out of reach for Phil Taylor. Cue a miraculous recovery and a breathtaking sudden death leg. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: IPL'25 Final RCB v PK Highlights
programme.desc: A champion is crowned in the IPL finals, as Royal Challengers Bangaluru take on Punjab Kings. The pair finished in the top two during the regular season. (03.06).

programme.title: IPL Kolkata.KR v Sunrisers.H Hlts
programme.desc: Kolkata Knight Riders face Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL. (02.04).

programme.title: PL Darts: Manchester
programme.desc: Manchester stages night nine of the Premier League as Luke Littler faces Gian van Veen, MVG battles Stephen Bunting, Luke Humphries meets Gerwyn Price and Jonny Clayton plays Josh Rock.

programme.title: ATP Miami 2026 Review
programme.desc: An in-depth review of all the action from the 2026 Miami Open - an ATP Masters 1000 event held at Hard Rock Stadium.

programme.title: WTA Miami 2026 Review
programme.desc: An in-depth review of all the action from the 2026 Miami Open - a WTA 1000 event forming part of the Sunshine Swing.

programme.title: S/Lge: St Helens v Wigan
programme.desc: St Helens play host to Wigan Warriors in the Betfred Super League. Stunned by Huddersfield last weekend, how will the previously unbeaten Warriors respond here.

programme.title: S/Lge: Hull KR v Hull FC
programme.desc: Laying down a marker befitting of champions last week, the Robins take on city rivals Hull FC at Sewell Group Craven Park. The Black and Whites eye a third consecutive win.

programme.title: Augusta National Women's Amateur Golf LIVE
programme.desc: Play begins on the last day of the Augusta National Women's Amateur. After a 36-hole cut at Champions Retreat, the iconic Augusta National sets the stage for the final round.

programme.title: Valero Texas Open, PGA Tour Golf LIVE
programme.desc: Day three of the 2026 Valero Texas Open from TPC San Antonio, where last year, 2023 Champion Golfer of the Year Brian Harman claimed victory.

programme.title: Aramco Championship USA, Ladies European Golf Tour LIVE
programme.desc: The opening round of the Aramco Championship, a Ladies European Tour event staged at Shadow Creek Golf Course in Nevada. Spain's Nuria Iturrioz scooped last year's prize.

programme.title: Valero Texas Open, PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Highlights from the Valero Texas Open from San Antonio, Texas. Canada's Corey Conners won here when the tournament was last played in 2019.

programme.title: Valero Texas Open, PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2023 Valero Texas Open, taking place at TPC San Antonio. A place at the Masters awaited the winner of this event.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal take the fear out of golf's scariest shots.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach what to take away from the best players and shots this year.

programme.title: Golf Academy
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, former star Colin Montgomerie offers advice on using the driver.

programme.title: Golf Academy
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, Tony Jacklin offers a lesson on driving.

programme.title: Augusta National Women's Amateur Golf
programme.desc: A golf tournament in Georgia, held at Augusta National Golf Club in Augusta.

programme.title: Aramco Championship USA, Ladies European Tour Golf
programme.desc: The third round of the Aramco Championship, a Ladies European Tour event staged at Shadow Creek Golf Course in Nevada. Spain's Nuria Iturrioz scooped last year's prize.

programme.title: Aramco Championship USA, Ladies European Tour Golf
programme.desc: The third round of the Aramco Championship, a Ladies European Tour event staged at Shadow Creek Golf Course in Nevada. Spain's Nuria Iturrioz scooped last year's prize.

programme.title: Drive, Chip and Putt Championship Golf LIVE
programme.desc: The 2026 Drive, Chip and Putt National Finals at Augusta National marks the 12th edition of the competition as junior golfers put their driving, chipping and putting skills to the test.

programme.title: LIVE: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day three of the 2026 Valero Texas Open from TPC San Antonio, where last year, 2023 Champion Golfer of the Year Brian Harman claimed victory.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: EFL 15/16:Middlesbrough v Brighton
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Middlesbrough take on Brighton and Hove Albion in a tense Championship promotion decider in May 2016.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Aston Villa v N. Forest
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Aston Villa play Nottingham Forest in a thrilling draw in September 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Cardiff v Bristol City
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Cardiff City face Bristol City in a Severnside derby in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was Neil Warnock's first game at Cardiff.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Burton v Birmingham
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Burton Albion face Birmingham City in 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was the sides' first competitive meeting.

programme.title: EFL 16/17:Birmingham v Aston Villa
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, local rivals Birmingham City and Aston Villa clash in the Sky Bet Championship at St Andrew's in October 2016.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Wolves v Derby County
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Wolves host Derby County at Molineux in a five-goal thriller back in a Bonfire Night sizzler in 2016.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: N. Forest v Newcastle
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest take on Newcastle United at the City Ground in a game that saw two red cards and two penalties.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Leeds United face Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship, with the sides meeting in the league for the first time since 2004.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Huddersfield v Leeds
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, a West Yorkshire derby as Huddersfield Town play Leeds United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Sheff Weds v Newcastle
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Sheffield Wednesday take on Newcastle United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship, with both sides looking for promotion chances.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Fulham v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Remember some classic matches from English football. In this episode, Fulham looked to maintain their playoff hopes against Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship in April 2017.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: N. Forest v Ipswich
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Nottingham Forest look to avoid relegation from the Sky Bet Championship as they face Ipswich Town in May 2017.

programme.title: EFL 12/13: Brentford v Swindon
programme.desc: Remember some classic matches from English football. Here, Brentford face Swindon Town in May 2013 in the League 1 semi final at Griffin Park.

programme.title: EFL 12/13: Bradford v Arsenal
programme.desc: A look at some of the greatest matches from English football. Here, League 2 side Bradford City take on Premier League giants Arsenal in the Football League Cup in December 2012.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Derby v Hull City
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County and Hull City go head-to-head in a thrilling encounter back in 2017.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Sheff Weds v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, relive a thrilling Steel City derby between rivals Sheffield Wednesday and Sheffield United at Hillsborough Stadium.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: A look at a classic match from the EFL. Here, Leeds and Sheffield United go head-to-head at Elland Road in a thrilling contest back in 2017.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Ipswich v Sheff Weds
programme.desc: A look at a classic match from the EFL. Here, Ipswich Town and Sheffield Wednesday meet at Portman Road in a four-goal thriller back in 2017.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: QPR v Brentford
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, QPR and Brentford go head-to-head at Loftus Road in a west London derby in 2017 that had a dramatic finish.

programme.title: EFL 16/17:Sheff Utd v Bristol City
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Sheffield United host Bristol City at Bramall Lane in 2017 in a game with a late dramatic twist.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Reading v Cardiff
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Reading host Cardiff City at the Madejski Stadium in 2017 in a game with a thrilling conclusion.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Bristol City v Man Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL Cup. Here, Bristol City host Premier League Man Utd at Ashton Gate in the 2017-18 competition's quarter-finals.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Leeds v Bristol City
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Leeds United host Bristol City at Elland Road in the Sky Bet Championship in a match that saw a dramatic comeback.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Arsenal v Man City
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL Cup. Here, Arsenal and Man City go head-to-head in the final of the 2017-18 competition at Wembley.

programme.desc: The UK's top sports journalists dissect the stories in the Sunday newspapers, offering insight, opinion and in-depth analysis. Essential viewing for fans who want more than just the score.
